# opnsense_unbound_host_override (Resource)
Manages an Unbound DNS host override (local DNS record) on OPNsense.
## Example Usage
```terraform
resource "opnsense_unbound_host_override" "nas" {
  hostname = "nas"
  domain   = "home.lan"
  rr       = "A"
  server   = "10.0.0.50"
}
```
<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain of the override (e.g., `example.com`).
- `hostname` (String) Hostname of the override (e.g., `www`).
- `server` (String) IP address or value for the DNS record.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the host override.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this host override is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `rr` (String) DNS record type: `A`, `AAAA`, `MX`, or `TXT`. Defaults to `A`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the host override in OPNsense.
## Import
```shell
terraform import opnsense_unbound_host_override.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
